{{Infobox event
| name = D’Niss invasion
| introduced = The Pilot
}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[D’Niss]] invaded [[Visiria]] one week prior to the current events.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c11">''The Pilot'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The D'Niss invasion is a recent disaster in the galaxy.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c23">''The Pilot'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Some in [[Visiria]] credited [[The Last Horizon]] with driving off the [[D’Niss invasion]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c34">''The Pilot'', chapter 34</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Events]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon events]]
